name: Modulate ToxMod
description: Modulate ToxMod — proactive voice chat moderation API for games and voice apps.

seo.title: Modulate ToxMod — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Modulate ToxMod: Modulate ToxMod — proactive voice chat moderation API for games and voice apps.

when_to_use: Moderating real-time voice chat in multiplayer games via API
Detecting harassment and hate speech in in-game voice comms
Building age-appropriate voice safety for gaming platforms
Running continuous voice toxicity detection without user disruption

pros: Category leader in voice chat moderation
Proactive detection, not just reactive reports
Strong case studies with Call of Duty and others
Handles voice context, tone, and speaker dynamics
cons: Integration needs game engine voice pipeline work
Privacy optics require clear player communication
review.verdict: The default voice moderation choice for serious game publishers; expect enterprise-grade sales and cost.
review.best_for: AAA and mid-size game studios with voice chat and harassment concerns.
review.not_for: Non-voice platforms or indie games without a T&S budget.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
